headline: Q4 Earnings Roundup: Yum! Brands (NYSE:YUM) And The Rest Of The Traditional Fast Food Segment
summary: As the craze of earnings season draws to a close, here’s a look back at some of the most exciting (and some less so) results from Q4. Today, we are looking at traditional fast food stocks, starting with Yum! Brands (NYSE:YUM).

headline: Is Yum! Brands Stock Underperforming the Dow?
summary: Despite Yum! Brands’ underperformance relative to the Dow over the past year, analysts remain moderately optimistic about the stock’s prospects.

headline: Will McDonald's 210M Loyalty Users Fuel Long-Term Growth?
summary: MCD's loyalty program nears 210M active users across more than 70 markets, boosting engagement and sales as it targets 250M members by 2027.
